chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.2609 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------- 17.02.2025 Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh Complainant Muhammad Khalid Izhar present ------------------------------------ Applicant/accused Faisal Ellahi is present on interim pre-arrest bail in FIR No.185 of 2023, registered at P.S. Ajmair Nagri, for offence under Section 406, PPC. 2. At the very outset, Mr. Irfan Ahmed Memon, advocate, files Vakalatnama as well as no objection on behalf of complainant Muhammad Khalid Izhar, for the reasons that the complainant and applicant/accused have settled their dispute outside the Court. Complainant is present and confirms the contents of application for no objection. In view of such position, learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded her no objection. 3. In view of the statement of learned counsel for complainant and no objection of learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh, interim pre-arrest bail granted to applicant/accused by this Court vide order dated 12.11.2024, is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. However, learned trial Court is directed to decide the case of applicant/accused expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. 5. Needless, to mention here that the observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and would not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. 6. The instant bail application is accordingly disposed of. - J U D G E Gulsher/PS
